creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
It works fine here provided Mk/Uses/gecko.mk is in sync with -i18n ports. Partial port updates aren't really supported.

$ cd /usr/ports/www/firefox-i18n
$ make -V BUILD_DEPENDS
/usr/local/lib/firefox/firefox:/usr/ports/www/firefox
$ make -V 32_DEPENDS

$ make -V 33_DEPENDS
/usr/local/lib/firefox/firefox:/usr/ports/www/firefox
$ make -V _GECKO_WANTED_VERSION
33
